arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola explains Erling Haaland’s absence from Manchester City squad against Liverpool
arts.sum: The Norwegian striker was ruled out of the Premier League clash due to injury

arts.ttl: Man City 'offer' Jack Grealish to Premier League giants
arts.sum: Newcastle United will reportedly be offered the chance to sign Manchester City star Jack Grealish when the 2025 summer transfer window opens. The England international has only started six Premier League games so far this season and he has been widely tipped to leave the Etihad Stadium this year amid his struggles under Pep Guardiola.

arts.ttl: Man City v Liverpool team news
arts.sum: The line-ups from the final match of Gameweek 26

arts.ttl: Man City interest in Bayer Leverkusen midfielder confirmed
arts.sum: Manchester City are planning a big summer bid to land Bayer Leverkusen midfielder Florian Wirtz. City are preparing for a major rebuild in the summer window following the club’s disappointing domestic campaign. Currently 17 points from the top of the Premier League and out of Europe, plans are underway for an overhaul of an ageing […] The post Man City interest in Bayer Leverkusen midfielder confirmed first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher names the player Liverpool need to keep more than Mohamed Salah
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah, Trent Alexander-Arnold and Virgil van Dijk are all in the final few months of their current Liverpool contracts, but Jamie Carragher believes one is more important to keep than the others

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland LEFT OUT of Manchester City's squad for their clash with Liverpool
arts.sum: Erling Haaland has been left out of the matchday squad for Manchester City's clash with Arsenal on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Manchester City v Liverpool: Premier League – live

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher highlights 'creaking' Liverpool issue that could keep title race alive
arts.sum: Liverpool will continue their Premier League title charge against Manchester City on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: 'They can do damage' - Liverpool sent Premier League title warning by player who fell just short
arts.sum: Liverpool are eight points clear atop the Premier League table after Arsenal lost to West Ham United and can extend their lead to 11 points by beating Manchester City

arts.ttl: Bernardo Silva thinks Man Utd have found his successor as Ruben Amorim 'approves transfer'
arts.sum: Rising Sporting CP star and Manchester United transfer target Geovany Quenda has already been given a seal of approval by Manchester City's Bernardo Silva
